name: Dragonborn
description: Creature Type: Humanoid. Size: Medium (about 5-7 feet tall). Speed: 30 feet. Draconic Ancestry: Your lineage stems from a dragon progenitor. Choose the kind of dragon from the Draconic Ancestors table. Your choice affects your Breath Weapon and Damage Resistance traits as well as your appearance. Dragons and damage types: Black/Acid, Blue/Lightning, Brass/Fire, Bronze/Lightning, Copper/Acid, Gold/Fire, Green/Poison, Red/Fire, Silver/Cold, White/Cold. Breath Weapon: When you take the Attack action on your turn, you can replace one of your attacks with an exhalation of magical energy in either a 15-foot Cone or a 30-foot Line that is 5 feet wide (choose the shape each time). Each creature in that area must make a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Constitution modifier and Proficiency Bonus). On a failed save, a creature takes 1d10 damage of the type determined by your Draconic Ancestry. On a successful save, half damage. This damage increases by 1d10 at levels 5 (2d10), 11 (3d10), and 17 (4d10). You can use this a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, regaining all uses on a Long Rest. Damage Resistance: You have Resistance to the damage type determined by your Draconic Ancestry. Darkvision: 60 feet. Draconic Flight: At level 5, as a Bonus Action, sprout spectral wings for 10 minutes (Fly Speed equal to your Speed). Once per Long Rest.

name: Dwarf
description: Creature Type: Humanoid. Size: Medium (about 4-5 feet tall). Speed: 30 feet. Darkvision: 120 feet. Dwarven Resilience: Resistance to Poison damage. Advantage on saves to avoid or end the Poisoned condition. Dwarven Toughness: Hit Point maximum increases by 1, and by 1 again whenever you gain a level. Stonecunning: As a Bonus Action, gain Tremorsense with a range of 60 feet for 10 minutes. Must be on or touching a stone surface. Uses equal to Proficiency Bonus, regained on Long Rest.

name: Elf
description: Creature Type: Humanoid. Size: Medium (about 5-6 feet tall). Speed: 30 feet. Darkvision: 60 feet. Elven Lineage: Choose a lineage. Drow: Darkvision increases to 120 feet. Know Dancing Lights cantrip. Level 3: Faerie Fire. Level 5: Darkness. Cast each without a spell slot equal to Proficiency Bonus times per Long Rest. High Elf: Know Prestidigitation cantrip (swap on Long Rest from Wizard list). Wood Elf: Speed increases to 35 feet. Know Druidcraft cantrip. Spellcasting ability: Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma (chosen at lineage selection). Fey Ancestry: Advantage on saves to avoid or end the Charmed condition. Keen Senses: Proficiency in Insight, Perception, or Survival. Trance: Don't need to sleep, magic can't put you to sleep. Finish a Long Rest in 4 hours of trancelike meditation.

name: Gnome
description: Creature Type: Humanoid. Size: Small (about 3-4 feet tall). Speed: 30 feet. Darkvision: 60 feet. Gnomish Cunning: Advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws. Gnomish Lineage: Choose one. Forest Gnome: Know Minor Illusion cantrip. Always have Speak with Animals prepared. Cast without a spell slot equal to PB times per Long Rest. Rock Gnome: Know Mending and Prestidigitation cantrips. Can spend 10 minutes casting Prestidigitation to create a Tiny clockwork device (AC 5, 1 HP). Max 3 devices, each lasts 8 hours. Spellcasting ability: Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma.

name: Goliath
description: Creature Type: Humanoid. Size: Medium (about 7-8 feet tall). Speed: 35 feet. Giant Ancestry: Choose one benefit (uses equal to PB, regained on Long Rest). Cloud's Jaunt: Bonus Action teleport up to 30 feet. Fire's Burn: Deal extra 1d10 Fire damage on a hit. Hill's Tumble: Force Strength save (DC 8 + Str mod + PB) on Large or smaller creature; Prone on failure. Stone's Endurance: Reaction to roll 1d12 + Con mod and reduce damage by that total. Storm's Thunder: Reaction to deal 1d8 Thunder damage to a creature within 60 feet that damaged you. Large Form: At level 5, Bonus Action to become Large for 10 minutes (Advantage on Strength checks, +10 feet Speed). Once per Long Rest. Powerful Build: Advantage on checks to end Grappled. Count as one size larger for carrying capacity.

name: Halfling
description: Creature Type: Humanoid. Size: Small (about 2-3 feet tall). Speed: 30 feet. Brave: Advantage on saves to avoid or end the Frightened condition. Halfling Nimbleness: Move through the space of any creature a size larger than you, but can't stop there. Luck: When you roll a 1 on a D20 Test, reroll and must use the new roll. Naturally Stealthy: Can take the Hide action when obscured only by a creature at least one size larger.

name: Human
description: Creature Type: Humanoid. Size: Medium (about 4-7 feet tall) or Small (about 2-4 feet tall), chosen when you select this species. Speed: 30 feet. Resourceful: Gain Heroic Inspiration whenever you finish a Long Rest. Skillful: Gain proficiency in one skill of your choice. Versatile: Gain an Origin feat of your choice. Skilled is recommended.

name: Orc
description: Creature Type: Humanoid. Size: Medium (about 6-7 feet tall). Speed: 30 feet. Adrenaline Rush: Take the Dash action as a Bonus Action and gain Temporary Hit Points equal to your Proficiency Bonus. Uses equal to PB, regained on Short or Long Rest. Darkvision: 120 feet. Relentless Endurance: When reduced to 0 HP but not killed outright, drop to 1 HP instead. Once per Long Rest.

name: Tiefling
description: Creature Type: Humanoid. Size: Medium (about 4-7 feet tall) or Small (about 3-4 feet tall), chosen when you select this species. Speed: 30 feet. Darkvision: 60 feet. Fiendish Legacy: Choose a legacy. Abyssal: Resistance to Poison damage. Know Poison Spray cantrip. Level 3: Ray of Sickness. Level 5: Hold Person. Chthonic: Resistance to Necrotic damage. Know Chill Touch cantrip. Level 3: False Life. Level 5: Ray of Enfeeblement. Infernal: Resistance to Fire damage. Know Fire Bolt cantrip. Level 3: Hellish Rebuke. Level 5: Darkness. Higher-level spells can be cast once without a spell slot per Long Rest, or using spell slots. Spellcasting ability: Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma. Otherworldly Presence: Know the Thaumaturgy cantrip (uses same spellcasting ability as Fiendish Legacy).
